name: JetBrains Junie

form_factor.comment: JetBrains IDE agent plus Junie CLI, GitHub Action, GitLab CI/CD, and Remote Mode web UI. Per-form-factor links: IDE: https://junie.jetbrains.com/docs/junie-ide-plugin.html; CLI: https://junie.jetbrains.com/docs/junie-cli.html; GitHub Action: https://junie.jetbrains.com/docs/junie-on-github.html; GitLab CI/CD: https://junie.jetbrains.com/docs/junie-gitlab-ci-cd.html; Web: https://junie.jetbrains.com/docs/junie-cli-remote-mode.html.

released_in.comment: Introduced by JetBrains as a coding agent in early 2025.

latest_major_update.comment: June 26, 2026 Junie CLI docs refresh documents extensions, AGENTS.md guidelines, custom slash commands, MCP configuration, custom subagents, hooks, BYOK/custom models, headless CI/CD, GitHub Action, GitLab CI/CD, and Remote Mode.

rules.comment: Full guideline support. Junie CLI reads `.junie/AGENTS.md`, project `AGENTS.md`, legacy `.junie/guidelines.md` or `.junie/guidelines/`, and global `~/.junie/AGENTS.md`.

skills.comment: Full support through Junie CLI extensions, which can package agent skills. Extension references live in `.junie/extensions.json` or `~/.junie/extensions/extensions.json`; cached content is under `~/.junie/extensions/<marketplace>/<extension>/`.

hooks.comment: Full support via config.json hooks. Hooks are shell commands on session lifecycle events; default project hooks are ignored for safety unless explicitly loaded.

mcp_servers.comment: Full MCP support. `/mcp` manages project `.junie/mcp/mcp.json` and user `~/.junie/mcp/mcp.json`; supports local and remote MCP servers plus an installation assistant.

custom_commands.comment: Full custom slash command support. Project commands are Markdown files in `.junie/commands`; user commands are in `~/.junie/commands`; `/commands` creates and manages them.

goal_command.comment: Junie runs as an IDE agent with tasks and modes; no built-in `/goal` slash command documented.

subagents.comment: Full custom subagent support. Subagents define tailored prompts, tool restrictions, model usage, and skills; Junie delegates automatically and stores custom agents in configured agent locations.

monitor.comment: Junie supports subagents, headless CI, and lifecycle hooks, but reviewed docs do not show a dedicated monitor/watch primitive for arbitrary long-running commands or event streams.

model_selection.comment: Full model selection through `/model` and config. Junie CLI can select the main LLM and reasoning effort; the home page advertises 10+ models via BYOK.

approval_mode.comment: Full approval control through brave mode levels (Off, Auto, On), action allowlist, and settings/config.

sandbox_mode.comment: Runs inside JetBrains IDE context; no explicit standalone sandbox controls found.

resume.comment: Supports session history and resuming previous sessions through `/history`.

continue.comment: Previous sessions can be resumed from `/history`; no separate continue-latest command was found.

non_interactive.comment: Supports headless mode for CI/CD environments and build pipelines.

statusline.comment: IDE UI, no custom CLI statusline found.

telemetry.comment: Feedback flow attaches current session logs; no broader telemetry-disable setting was found in docs reviewed.

hosted_agent.comment: Junie can run from GitHub Action and GitLab CI/CD on issues, PRs, or MRs; this is CI-hosted automation rather than a managed always-on cloud worker.

custom_model_provider.comment: Full custom model/BYOK support through custom JSON model profiles, local providers such as Ollama, enterprise proxies, and supported API-compatible endpoints.

pricing.value: Bundled with JetBrains AI tiers/free credits
pricing.comment: Junie is included in JetBrains AI subscription/free-tier credit model.

notes: Strong fit for JetBrains users, debugger-aware workflows, CLI/headless CI, and JetBrains IDE integration. June 2026 docs now expose extensibility details for guidelines, extensions, MCP, subagents, commands, hooks, BYOK/custom models, and CI/CD.

transcripts.comment: Interactive CLI exposes the full current-session transcript with Ctrl+T and session history with `/history`; public docs do not specify the disk storage path.

keyboard_shortcuts.comment: Research needed. Check official documentation for keybinding customization options.

auto_save.comment: Research needed. Check for auto-save or session persistence features.

debugging_output.comment: Supports `/debug` mode, where Junie CLI acts as an AI debugging assistant against a live debugger session in a connected JetBrains IDE.

context_window.comment: Research needed. Check for configurable context length or token limits.

code_formatting.comment: Research needed. Check for formatter/linter integration or auto-format options.

git_integration.comment: Full git workflow support through review mode, GitHub Action, GitLab CI/CD, issue/MR/PR triggers, worktrees, and automated PR/code-review workflows.

performance_mode.comment: Research needed. Check for caching, optimization, or resource management settings.

ui_customization.comment: CLI settings include theme, notifications, step limit, subagents mode, and diff view mode; no broad layout customization was found.
